events.name: Production DB migration failure 2024
events.description: Live schema migration on 500 GB users table caused 47 min downtime due to table lock contention

events.name: Planned 2026 DB migration
events.description: Planned migration of 12 GB orders table with read replica promotion during maintenance window

patterns.name: Live schema migration without lock timeout causes table-level lock contention
loadBearingDifferences: table is 12 GB vs 500 GB — 40x smaller
read replica promotion eliminates write traffic during ALTER
patterns.verdictRationale: The structural failure mode (live migration without lock_timeout) is not present in the 2026 plan. Load-bearing differences eliminate the known failure mechanism.

causalChains.name: 2024 failure causal chain

links.mechanism: ALTER TABLE acquires exclusive lock; concurrent writes queue indefinitely without lock_timeout

alternativeExplanations: Underlying disk I/O saturation may have prolonged lock hold time
